headline: AI startup supporting Europe’s air traffic management software upgrade raises $5.5m seed funding
summary: BUCHAREST, Romania, May 13, 2026--An enterprise software startup whose platform has helped to modernize aviation infrastructure across Europe has raised more than $5.5 million in seed funding, highlighting growing demand for tools that can safely and speedily upgrade mission-critical systems.
